summary: Customer testimonial from Satu Tannien (Finland) praising Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots for year-round trail riding and driving with studs, easy on/off despite arthritis, and reliable fit.
Customer testimonial from Diane Peterson (Wisconsin) on using Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots to protect a soft-footed horse after it lost a shoe; notes the boots stay on and are comfortable.
Customer testimonial from Marcia Radke (Arizona) about an eight-mile mountain trail ride in Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots with no rubbing; also mentions the Ride Fly-Free Mask.
Customer testimonial from Tom Carnahan (Sumrsnow Morgans) describing a horse named Cantata rehabbing to barefoot using Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots for pain relief.
Customer testimonial from trail rider and author Janine Wilder calling the Cavallo Simple Boot a carefree 'spare tire' that protects her horse's feet.
Customer testimonial from Lisa C. Crites (West Virginia) on a four-hour rough-terrain trail ride in Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots; boots stayed on and prevented stumbling.
Customer testimonial from Wendy Martin (Western Australia) using Cavallo Simple Boots for Natural Horsemanship and trail riding with a hammer-shy Paint horse; praises front fastening.
Customer testimonial from Kim Klinger (Newville, PA) using Cavallo Simple Boots for winter riding on a tender-footed mare; notes the boots don't shift or fly off.
Customer testimonial from Nicole Martin (Switzerland) on Cavallo Simple Boots protecting white, crack-prone hooves on hard trail terrain; praises fit, traction, and ease of use.
Endorsement from Monty Roberts (California) for the Cavallo Total Comfort System Saddle Pads, praising the gullet system, memory foam, thinness, and reversible New Zealand wool side.
Testimonial from equine behaviorist Mary Ann Simonds on Cavallo saddle pads reducing spinal pressure for Grand Prix jumpers and resolving behavioral issues tied to sore backs.
Testimonial from professional barrel racer Jana Echols Thornton (WPRA) on the Cavallo Total Comfort System Saddle Pad eliminating motion hindrance and distributing rider weight evenly.
